title: Craft chain armor
description: This mod allows you to craft chainmail armor set.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f46b6fd467b011ae181aa1a95d7c198515a79986.png)

### **Wait for neoforge version!**
